title: Paragraphs Reforged
description: Minecraft mod that allows you to write Section sign (§).
body:
## Paragraphs Reforged

Minecraft mod that allows you to write Section sign (§). Also applied to signs and hanging signs.

May be useful when you paste item NBT in command block or mods.

Fabric version (original): https://modrinth.com/mod/paragraphs
